items.titolo: OpenAI lancia GPT-5.2, è più veloce e affidabile
items.descrizione: OpenAI lancia GPT-5.2 definendolo il miglior modello per uso professionale, più veloce, preciso e meno soggetto ad allucinazioni. The post OpenAI lancia GPT-5.2, è più veloce e affidabile appeared first on Punto…

items.titolo: Are GPT-5.2's new powers enough to surpass Gemini 3? Try it and see
items.descrizione: The new model performs 'at or above a human expert level,' according to OpenAI.

items.titolo: Do you ask AI deep questions at night? 37.5 million Copilot conversations show you're not alone
items.descrizione: From work-related conversations on our desktops by day to personal advice on our phones after hours, AI now integrates 'into the full texture of human life,' a Microsoft study finds.

items.titolo: Microsoft, Google, OpenAI, and Anthropic join forces to form Agentic AI alliance, according to report — organization backed by the Linux Foundation is set to create open source standards for AI agents
items.descrizione: The world's leading AI firms are collaborating on a new Agentic Artificial Intelligence Foundation managed by the Linux Foundation to build open standards around AI agents. The move will focus on three key open source…

items.titolo: Nvidia decries 'far-fetched' reports of smuggling in face of DeepSeek training reports — unnamed sources claim Chinese company is involved in Blackwell smuggling ring
items.descrizione: DeepSeek is allegedly involved in a "phantom data center" smuggling scheme to get Blackwell GPU servers into China as part of training its newest LLM generation. While Nvidia refutes the claims as "farfetched", some…
